options.name: -addFixAttr
options.description: make the inserted decap cell fixed for placement.

options.name: -area
options.description: Defines an area within the design in which add decoupling capacitance.

options.name: -cells
options.description: Specifies the cells to use for decoupling capacitance insertion.

options.name: -effort
options.description: Specifies the approach for inserting decoupling capacitance.

options.name: -exclude
options.description: {{<llx> <lly> <urx> <ury>} {} ...} Defines blockage areas within the decoupling capacitance cannot be inserted.

options.name: -fromFile
options.description: Using the info in the specified file.

options.name: -log
options.description: Specifies the output log file name.

options.name: -maxNrIter
options.description: define the iteration for inserting decap if there's DRC.

options.name: -pgNet
options.description: Adds decap cells on the specified power rail

options.name: -prefix
options.description: Defines the prefix to use for the decoupling capacitance cells.

options.name: -totCap
options.description: Specifies the total decpupling capacitance (in fF).
